# Extração: 05-10X Podcast -  Promotion Checklist

- **Fonte:** 05-10X Podcast -  Promotion Checklist.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 2.54 MB

---

Create show notes (outline, questions, links, etc)
Upload MP3 to podcast server with all information
• Podcast title (30 characters max with keywords)
• Podcast description (include notes and links)
• Add Apple only info (episode number, etc)
• Add episode artwork image (3000x3000 pixels)
• Adjust all info and settings (rating, author, etc)
Upload MP4 to YouTube (if recorded as a video)
PREPARE AND UPLOAD
Get links to Apple, Spotify and major directories
Post player and show notes on your website
Promote episode on all social media accounts
Send episode to your email and marketing lists
Try to get guest to promote show to their network
Share in niche groups and/or consider paid ads
POST AND SHARE

PODCAST PROMOTION CHECKLIST
Promotion never ends, spread the word!
NOTE: Your hosting provider’s RSS feed will automatically
distribute to all directories you’ve submitted to. Make sure
you’re on as many as possible!
